goal: Understand how Supabase Auth is configured, what redirects exist, and where email confirmation links currently send users
summary: Completed audit of auth flow. Key findings: signUp is missing emailRedirectTo, causing email confirmation links to redirect to the default Supabase site URL. AuthCallbackPage only handles ?code= params. SignupPage navigates to / immediately without handling pending confirmation. Audit written to docs/audit.md.
stepSummaries: 1. Read src/lib/supabase.ts, src/lib/auth.ts, src/hooks/useAuth.ts, LoginPage, and SignupPage to understand current auth setup and redirect handling [verified]
